shot_context.shot_emotion_summary: Exaggerated indignation giving way to theatrical self-pity — comedic timing with a pause before the punchline reaction.
shot_context.shot_motion_summary: Animated upper-body reaction: arms spread wide, then clasped dramatically to chest, followed by a deliberate slump.

scene_context.visible_setting: Ornate hotel lobby, pink and lavender wallpaper, art deco fixtures, warm lighting
scene_context.narrative_situation: A concierge receives an absurd complaint and responds with theatrical outrage

face_analysis.expression_caption: An exaggerated performance of shock. His eyebrows shoot upward with theatrical amplitude, mouth drops open in an O shape that is too round and too held to be genuine surprise. He maintains this cartoonish expression for a beat too long — the comedic timing lives in the hold. Then his brows descend sharply, eyes narrow with exaggerated suspicion, and his mouth purses into a tight disapproving circle. The transition is abrupt and deliberate, each expression snapping into place like costume changes.

alternative_captions.direct: His eyebrows shoot up and his mouth drops into an O. He holds the expression. Then his brows drop, eyes narrow, and his mouth purses tightly.
alternative_captions.literary: His face becomes a silent film — each expression arriving fully formed and held one beat past credibility, the surprise so round it could be stamped on a coin, the disapproval that replaces it equally precise and equally performed.
alternative_captions.direction: Big surprise: brows maximum height, mouth O-shape, hold 2 full beats — it must read as deliberate overacting. Snap transition: brows slam down, eyes narrow to slits, lips purse. No in-between. The comedy is in the abruptness of the switch.
alternative_captions.situational: As if performing outrage for an audience of one, knowing full well that the person watching can see through it, and not caring in the slightest.

facial_components.eyes: First phase: wide open, whites visible all around. Second phase: narrowed to near-slits with suspicion.
facial_components.eyebrows: First phase: raised to maximum height, forehead deeply lined. Second phase: pulled down sharply, creating a V furrow.
facial_components.mouth: First phase: dropped open in a theatrical O shape. Second phase: pursed into a tight circle of disapproval.
facial_components.jaw: First phase: dropped fully. Second phase: raised and pushed forward slightly.

facial_attributes.distinctive_notes: Thin pencil mustache. Slicked-back dark hair. Period costume with high collar.

body_analysis.motion_caption: A three-phase theatrical body performance synchronized with the facial acting. Phase 1: Both arms fly outward from the body to full extension, palms upward in a gesture of bewildered affront — the motion is quick and exaggerated. His torso leans backward slightly as if physically pushed by the absurdity. Phase 2: A held moment of maximum spread, shoulders high and locked. Phase 3: Both hands snap inward to clasp over his chest, fingers interlaced, as his torso folds forward into a deliberately exaggerated slump of theatrical self-pity. The shoulders round forward conspicuously.

alternative_captions.direct: Both arms fly outward, palms up. He holds the spread pose. Then he clasps both hands to his chest and slumps forward.
alternative_captions.literary: His body opens like a book of grievances — arms flung wide to the margins — before snapping shut, hands clutched to his heart as though it might escape, folding inward on the axis of his own magnificent offense.
alternative_captions.direction: Arms out, palms up, full extension — fast, under 0.5s. Lean back. Hold 2 beats. Snap: hands together at chest, fingers interlaced, slump forward. Exaggerate the shoulder rounding. This is physical comedy — every motion should read from the back row.
alternative_captions.situational: With the bodily rhetoric of a man who has elevated complaining to a performing art and is currently delivering his magnum opus.

upper_body_detail.head: Tilts back slightly during arms-spread phase, then drops forward during slump phase
upper_body_detail.neck: Extended backward in phase 1, compressed forward in phase 3
upper_body_detail.shoulders: Rise and spread wide in phase 1, held high in phase 2, round dramatically forward in phase 3
upper_body_detail.arms: Phase 1: fly outward to full horizontal extension, elbows straight. Phase 3: snap inward, elbows bent, hands clasped at chest.
upper_body_detail.hands: Phase 1: open, palms upward in 'why' gesture. Phase 3: interlaced at chest center, gripping tightly.
upper_body_detail.torso: Phase 1: slight backward lean. Phase 3: forward fold, rounding at mid-back.

body_analysis.gesture_detail: Both arms extend outward horizontally with palms facing upward in an exaggerated 'can you believe this' gesture. The spread is wide — arms nearly 180 degrees. After the hold, both hands snap inward and interlock over the sternum in a clasping self-comfort gesture. The entire sequence is performed with theatrical precision and deliberate overstatement.
